rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Service Control Manager Spawning Command Shell with Suspect Strings

rules.rule_text:
title: Service Control Manager Spawning Command Shell with Suspect Strings
id: cdf9f0ba-857a-4f91-9f30-724ade93b797
status: experimental
description: "The following pseudo detector should generate an alert when services.exe\
  \ spawns \ncmd.exe along with a corresponding echo or /c command, which are common\
  \ attributes \nof post exploitation that we\u2019ve seen in association with this\
  \ technique. Part of \nthe RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/windows-command-shell/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059
- attack.t1059.003
- attack.t1569
- attack.t1569.002
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: \services.exe
    Image|endswith: \cmd.exe
    CommandLine|contains:
    - echo
    - /c
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
